runners.formComment: Produced a good run, hitting the frame last run (20.23) at this track in a Grade 6. Has first look at box 1 this time. Key chance and should go close.

runners.formComment: Back from a four months spell and last resumed over 352m at this track where she was in the placings, finishing third. Well placed and among the chances here.

runners.formComment: Hit the ground running last time with a fast early split and never headed, leading throughout to win by 0.8 lengths (20.10) over 352m at this track. Can continue the winning form.
